---
name: Scenario Idea
about: Propose a new evaluation scenario
title: "[SCENARIO] "
labels: scenario
assignees: ""
---

## Scenario Name

A short, descriptive name.

## Description

What situation does this scenario simulate?

## Number of Agents

How many agents are involved and what roles do they play?

## Trigger Event

What event kicks off the scenario (e.g., a resource shortage, a new arrival)?

## Expected Agent Behaviors

Describe the key behaviors you would expect to observe from agents.

## Quality Criteria

How should we judge whether the simulation produced a realistic or interesting outcome?
